payload.answer: Extracted three atomic memory cards: durable source evidence requirement, atomic card design guideline, and database ownership of lifecycle/conflict state.
payload.decision: extract three atomic memory cards reflecting core principles about durable source evidence, atomicity, and lifecycle ownership

entity_resolution.reason: All entities are explicitly named and unambiguous in input; no resolution needed.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

details: All memory cards are atomic, traceable, and grounded in input.
No superseded or deleted facts presented.
Ambiguity preserved where input did not specify further detail.
Lifecycle ownership clearly assigned to application database as mandated.
